jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN MBSFN Address Book
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cActionCode: 'I', cSuppressErrorMessages: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE0001', mnAddressBookNumber: attributes.queryParams.entityID as Number }]

jdeatina:authenticate.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "JDE User": p('config.jdeUserMulesoft'), "JDE Password": p('config.jdePassword'), "JDE Environment": p('config.jdeEnvironment'), "JDE Role": p('config.jdeRole'), "Session Id": 0, "Transaction ID": 0, "JDE WS Connection": false }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN MBSFN Address Book
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { "JDE Token": vars.auth."JDE Token", cActionCode: 'I', cSuppressErrorMessages: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE0001', mnAddressBookNumber: attributes.queryParams.entityID as Number }]

jdeatina:logout.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "JDE Token": vars.auth."JDE Token", "Transaction ID": 44444, "JDE WS Connection": false }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN Create Address Book
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cActionCode: 'A', cUpdateMasterFile: '1', cSuppressErrorMessages: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE0001', mnAddressBookNumber: 0, szSearchType: 'C', szAlphaName: payload.customerName, szMailingName: payload.customerName, szBusinessUnit: ' 1', szAddressLine1: payload.customerAddress, szAddressLine2: '', szAddressLine3: '', szAddressLine4: '', szCity: payload.customerCity, szState: payload.customerState, cPayablesYNM: 'N', cReceivablesYN: 'Y', cARAPNettingY: 'N', cIndicatorFlg: 'A' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Customer created successfully", customerId: vars.addressBookRecord.mnAddressBookNumber as String }

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN MBSFN Address Book
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cActionCode: 'D', cUpdateMasterFile: '1', cSuppressErrorMessages: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE0001', mnAddressBookNumber: attributes.queryParams.entityID as Number }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "AB has been deleted", detail: vars.abRecord }

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN Get Customer
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cActionCode: 'I', szVersion: 'ZJDE00001', mnCustomerNumber: attributes.queryParams.entityID as Number }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN MBSFN Address Book
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cActionCode: 'I', cSuppressErrorMessages: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE0001', mnAddressBookNumber: attributes.queryParams.entityID as Number }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Customer detail", detailCustomer: vars.customerRecord, detailAB: vars.abRecord }

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN Create Address Book
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { "Transaction ID": vars.transaction."Transaction ID", cActionCode: 'A', cUpdateMasterFile: '1', cSuppressErrorMessages: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE0001', mnAddressBookNumber: 0, szSearchType: 'C', szAlphaName: payload.customerName, szMailingName: payload.customerName, szBusinessUnit: ' 1', szAddressLine1: payload.customerAddress, szAddressLine2: '', szAddressLine3: '', szAddressLine4: '', szCity: payload.customerCity, szState: payload.customerState, cPayablesYNM: 'N', cReceivablesYN: 'Y', cARAPNettingY: 'N', cIndicatorFlg: 'A' }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN Create Customer
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { "Transaction ID": vars.transaction."Transaction ID", cActionCode: 'A', cUpdateMasterFile: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE00002', szCompany: '00000', szCurrencyCodeFrom: payload.paymentCurrency, szTaxArea1: 'DEN', szTaxExplanationCode1: 'S', mnAmountCreditLimit: 200000, szPaymentTermsAR: '', szCurrencyCodeAmounts: payload.paymentCurrency, mnAmountHighBalance: 300000, cBatchProcessingMode: '', mnCustomerNumber: vars.addressBookRecord.mnAddressBookNumber, cPersonCorporationCode: '', szVersionconsolidated: 'ZJDE00002', DateEntered: |2025-07-15T14:00:00-03:00| }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Customer created successfully", customerId: vars.addressBookRecord.mnAddressBookNumber as String }

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN Create Customer
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cActionCode: 'D', cUpdateMasterFile: '1', szVersion: 'ZJDE00002', mnCustomerNumber: attributes.queryParams.entityID as Number, cPersonCorporationCode: '', szVersionconsolidated: 'ZJDE00002' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "Customer created deleted", detail: vars.customerRecord }

jdeatina:submit-batch-process.doc:name: Submit Batch Upload

jdeatina:get-batch-process-information.doc:name: Get Batch Status

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "UBE submite with ID " ++ (vars.ubeSubmited."JOB Number" as String) , jobId: vars.getStatus."JOB Status" }

jdeatina:poll-events.doc:name: Get Customers Created
jdeatina:poll-events.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/java --- { "Transaction Code": 'JDECM', "Last Batch Number (EDBT)": '', "Max Qty Transactions to Read": attributes.queryParams.qtyRecords, "Lock Events": 'N', "Update Events": 'N', "Match Interop Line Number": false }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- read(payload."Event Transactions" as String,'application/xml')

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN BeginDoc
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { cCMDocAction: 'A', cCMProcessEdits: '1', szCMComputerID: 'ATINA', cCMUpdateWriteToWF: '2', szCMProgramID: 'CORBA', szCMVersion: 'ZJDE0001', szOrderCo: '00001', szOrderType: 'SO', szBusinessUnit: ' 30', mnAddressNumber: payload.deliverTo, jdRequestedDate: (payload.dateRequested default (now() as Date { format: "yyyy-MM-dd" })), jdOrderDate: now(), szReference: 'Atina Reference', cMode: 'F', szUserID: 'JDE', cRetrieveOrderNo: '1' }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN EditLine
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { mnCMJobNo: vars.BeginDoc.mnCMJobNumber, cCMWriteToWFFlag: '2', szCMComputerID: vars.BeginDoc.szCMComputerID, mnOrderNo: vars.BeginDoc.mnOrderNo, szOrderType: vars.BeginDoc.szOrderType, szBusinessUnit: vars.BeginDoc.szBusinessUnit, szItemNo: payload.itemId, mnQtyOrdered: payload.quantityOrdered }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN EndDoc
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { mnCMJobNo: vars.BeginDoc.mnCMJobNumber, mnSalesOrderNo: vars.BeginDoc.mnOrderNo, szCMComputerID: vars.BeginDoc.szCMComputerID, szOrderType: vars.BeginDoc.szOrderType, cCMUseWorkFiles: 2 }]

jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.doc:name: Invoke BSFN ClearWorkFile
jdeatina:invoke-bsfn.jdeatina:input-parameters: #[output application/json --- { mnJobNo: vars.BeginDoc.mnCMJobNumber, szComputerID: 'ATINA', cClearHeaderWF: '2', cClearDetailWF: '2' }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { BeginDoc: vars.BeginDoc, EndDoc: vars.EndDoc }
